headline: Is Teledyne Technologies (TDY) Undervalued As Its Earnings Beat Lifts The Outlook?
summary: Teledyne Technologies (TDY) is back in focus after reporting Q2 2026 earnings, with record quarterly orders, revenue of $1.66b, and adjusted EPS of $6.28 that came in above consensus expectations. See our latest analysis for Teledyne Technologies. headline: Teledyne (TDY) Stock Trades At a Premium To Fair Value
summary: Teledyne Technologies stock has delivered a strong 67.7% return over the past three years, yet its valuation checks suggest it no longer looks like an obvious bargain. The intrinsic value estimate from a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model points to roughly fair value, while market multiples lean on the expensive side. A 67.7% three year return sets a high bar for fresh buyers, as a lot of optimism may already be reflected in the current share price. Expectations for continued cash flow...

headline: Teledyne Announces Strategic Five-Year Partnership with Royal National Lifeboat Institution, the UK’s Largest Lifeboat Service
summary: FAREHAM, England, July 23, 2026--Teledyne Raymarine and Teledyne FLIR Marine today announced a strategic five-year partnership with the Royal National Lifeboat Institution (RNLI), the largest lifeboat service operating around the coast of the United Kingdom, Ireland and the Channel Islands, to deliver advanced navigation and thermal imaging technologies to its fleet of vessels, enhancing the charity’s ability to respond swiftly and effectively in lifesaving operations at sea.
